title: Set up project architecture
description: Define the folder structure, configure Spring Boot, set up security, and establish coding standards for the team.

title: Implement user authentication
description: Build JWT-based login and registration endpoints with proper password hashing and token validation.

title: Design database schema
description: Create ERD diagrams and define MySQL table structures with proper indexing and relationships.

title: Build task CRUD API
description: Implement create, read, update, and delete operations for the Task entity with pagination support.

title: Write API documentation
description: Set up Swagger/OpenAPI documentation with proper descriptions for all endpoints.

title: Set up Docker environment
description: Create Dockerfiles and docker-compose configuration for local development and production deployment.

title: Implement role-based access control
description: Add RBAC with ADMIN and USER roles, method-level security, and protected admin endpoints.

title: Add input validation
description: Implement Jakarta Validation annotations on all DTOs and create a global exception handler for clean error responses.

title: Create frontend dashboard
description: Build a React dashboard with Vite showing task statistics, recent tasks, and quick action buttons.

title: Performance optimization
description: Add Redis caching for frequently accessed data, optimize database queries, and implement connection pooling.

title: Write unit tests for services
description: Create comprehensive unit tests for AuthService and TaskService using JUnit 5 and Mockito.

title: Deploy to staging environment
description: Configure CI/CD pipeline for automated deployment to the staging server with health checks.
